name: testVerifyAcquirerStatus
description: Verify Acquirer status 'Active/Inactive' is displayed in column 'Status'
descriptionHtml: Verify Acquirer status 'Active/Inactive' is displayed in column 'Status'

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Verify Acquirer status 'Active/Inactive' is displayed in column 'Status'

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Select '0801.103231 Active acquirer' acquirer using filter
